steps.title: Define historical analysis
steps.content: The audience is unfamiliar with historical analysis, so the sentence should first explain what the concept means. The notes define it as an approach to art criticism that considers the historical context in which a work was created.

steps.title: Reject examples and comparisons
steps.content: Choice B gives an example from Las Meninas without defining the concept. Choice C describes stylistic analysis instead. Choice D contrasts stylistic and historical analysis, but it defines only stylistic analysis. The definition of historical analysis is the needed introduction. The answer is A.
